exercises.title: Group 1 Negative — う-Verbs
exercises.intro: Group 1 verbs change their final kana to the matching あ-row sound, then add ない. The one special case is verbs ending in う: う becomes わない, not あない.
exercises.takeaway: For Group 1, move the final kana to the あ-row, then add ない; う becomes わない.

exercises.prompt: Which is the correct plain negative of the Group 1 verb かう?
Say 'He doesn't talk much' using the Group 1 negative:

slot.hint: The plain negative form of 'to speak'.

exercises.speakText: かれは あまり はなさない。

exercises.title: Group 2 Negative — Drop る
exercises.intro: Group 2 verbs are simpler than Group 1. Remove the final る and attach ない directly.
exercises.takeaway: For Group 2, drop る and add ない. Do not shift to the あ-row.

exercises.prompt: Which is the correct plain negative of the Group 2 verb たべる?
Say 'I won't eat breakfast' using the Group 2 negative:

slot.hint: The plain negative form of 'to eat'.

exercises.speakText: あさごはんを たべない。

exercises.title: Group 3 Negative — Irregular Verbs
exercises.intro: Only two core verbs are irregular here, but they are extremely common. Memorise their ない forms instead of trying to apply a Group 1 or Group 2 rule.
exercises.takeaway: Group 3 is memorised: する -> しない, くる -> こない.

exercises.prompt: Which pair gives the correct plain negatives for する and くる?
options: するない / くるない
すらない / くらない

exercises.prompt: Say 'I have to submit homework' using the negative + と pattern:

slot.hint: The plain negative form of 'to submit'.

exercises.speakText: しゅくだいを ださないと。

exercises.title: Plain Form in Patterns
exercises.intro: Plain forms appear inside many grammar patterns, even when the whole sentence is polite or casual. Before と おもう, use the dictionary form or the ない form directly.
rows: いかないと おもう
I think someone will not go
はなさないでください
exercises.takeaway: Use the plain form before patterns like と おもう, and use ないでください for polite negative requests.

exercises.prompt: Which pattern politely means 'Please don't speak'?
options: はなさないでください
はなしてないください

exercises.prompt: Say 'I hope it doesn't rain' using a plain negative before と:

slot.hint: The plain negative form of 'to rain or fall'.

exercises.speakText: あめが ふらないと いいね。

exercises.prompt: Which correctly forms the plain negative of かう?
exercises.title: G1: う-verb -> あ-row + ない

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.note: Verbs ending in う use the special change う -> わない.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.note: Do not apply a direct あ-row change to う-ending verbs.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.note: Group 1 verbs do not attach ない to the dictionary form.

variants.label: DIFFERENT MEANING
variants.note: This is the negative of かく, not かう.

exercises.takeaway: For う-ending Group 1 verbs, use わない: かう -> かわない.
exercises.speakText: かわない

exercises.prompt: Which correctly forms the plain negative of たべる?
exercises.title: G2: る-verb -> drop る, add ない

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.note: Group 2 drops る and attaches ない directly.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.note: Group 2 verbs do not use the あ-row shift.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.note: Do not attach ない to the full dictionary form.

exercises.takeaway: For Group 2, remove る first: たべる -> たべない.
exercises.speakText: たべない

exercises.prompt: Which pair correctly gives the Group 3 negatives?
exercises.title: G3: Irregular

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.note: する and くる are irregular and must be memorised.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.jp: するない / くるない
variants.note: You cannot attach ない directly to these dictionary forms.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.jp: すらない / くらない
variants.note: Applying a Group 1-style shift creates incorrect forms.

exercises.takeaway: Memorise the irregular pair: する -> しない, くる -> こない.
exercises.speakText: しない。こない。

exercises.prompt: Which is the polite negative request 'Please don't speak'?
exercises.title: ～ないでください — polite negative request

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.jp: はなさないでください
variants.note: Attach でください after the ない-form as ないでください.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.note: The request pattern needs ないでください, not ないください.

variants.label: NATURAL
variants.note: This is natural casually, but it is not the polite request with ください.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.note: Use the ない-form before でください.

exercises.takeaway: For polite negative requests, use the ない-form plus でください.
exercises.speakText: はなさないでください

exercises.title: Plain Form and ない in Context
exercises.intro: Plain forms work in casual questions, negative statements, and sentence patterns. These examples show the same verb forms inside real sentences.
rows: あさごはんを たべない。
にほんごが わからない。
かれは あまり はなさない。
おさけを のまない ひとです。
He/she is a person who doesn't drink.
あめが ふらないと いいね。
ame ga furanai to ii ne.
しゅくだいを ださないと。
exercises.takeaway: The same plain forms appear in casual speech, noun-modifying phrases, and grammar patterns.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: あさごはんを たべない。

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: にほんごが わからない。

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: かれは あまり はなさない。

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: まだ きめない。

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: おさけを のまない ひとです。
options: He is someone who drinks a lot.
He/she is a person who doesn't drink.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: あした いく？

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: しゅくだいを ださないと。

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: あめが ふらないと いいね。

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: あさごはんを たべない

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: にほんごが わからない

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: かれは あまり はなさない

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: まだ きめない

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: あした いく

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: しゅくだいを ださないと

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: おさけを のまない ひとです

exercises.prompt: Match each word to its meaning:

exercises.title: Reading practice — plain form and ない

cards.jp: あさごはんを たべない。
にほんごが わからない。
あめが ふらないと いいね。
cards.romaji: ame ga furanai to ii ne.

cards.jp: しゅくだいを ださないと。
かれは あまり はなさない。
おさけを のまない ひとです。
cards.en: He/she is a person who doesn't drink.

cards.jp: ボタンを おすと、でんきが つく。
cards.romaji: botan o osu to, denki ga tsuku.
cards.en: If you press the button, the light turns on.

cards.jp: きのう たべなかった。
